title: Implement Meshtastic mobile app compatibility MVP
description: Why this exists: the standard Meshtastic mobile app must be able to discover, pair, connect, and perform basic local-node operations against LICHEN firmware. What needs to be done: implement the smallest Meshtastic BLE/GATT/NUS/protobuf subset needed for pairing, node info, status/config, and send/receive message flows, mapped onto LICHEN local CoAP/status/message/key flows. Acceptance criteria: app can discover/pair/connect; app can read node info/status/config; app can send a message into the LICHEN local interface; incoming LICHEN message/status can be surfaced to the app; unsupported Meshtastic features return explicit errors; RF protocol remains LICHEN, not Meshtastic; three independent codereview subagents run after code changes and findings are recorded.
